results.rendered_html:
asthāna a. Very deep.
— naṃ
1 A bad or wrong place; asthāne patatāmatīva mahatāmetādṛśī syādgatiḥ  S. D. 
2 An improper place or object or occasion; ˚varṣī  Dk. 81  (= apātradāyin); asthānaṃ paribhūteḥ  K. 45.
